title: Fusion Intelligence Summary (Command Centre Gen AI layer)
description: Output of the Gen AI fusion layer. Takes scam + counterfeit + fraud-graph results and produces one correlated, human-readable intelligence package. This is the 'wow moment' payload rendered on the command centre.

summary.description: Plain-English intelligence summary, e.g. 'This scam call is linked to a fraud ring active in Jamtara, where a counterfeit note was also seized.'

linked_signals.description: Which source signals were correlated into this package.

ref_event_id.description: event_id / ring_id from the source result.

reason.description: Why this signal was linked (shared district, phone->account, timing).

correlation_basis.description: Signals that drove the correlation, for auditability.

map_hotspots.description: Points for the cross-domain crime map. Overlapping clusters = coordinated hub.

audit_trail.description: For legal admissibility — traceable inputs and model metadata.
